subsidyType: multi-year utility-managed replacement project for addresses identified through the GIUD inventory and mailed notices
publicSideCovered: yes the utility manages replacement work through the current city project
privateSideCovered: private-side responsibility should be confirmed with GIUD for the specific address because the public page focuses on identification and project scheduling
propertyRules: addresses with lead or unknown service material move through the city's notice and project workflow
contractorRules: GIUD staff and project contractors coordinate mailed notices inspections and replacement scheduling
